name: Allen Courts TillicumPark
description: Allen Courts TillicumPark is a place to play pickleball in Forks, WA. There are 2 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Players have access to restrooms.

name: Carrie Blake Park
description: Carrie Blake Park is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Sequim, WA. There are 8 outdoor concrete courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. Amenities include restrooms and water. The courts are free.

name: Elk's Playfield
description: Elk's Playfield is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Port Angeles, WA. There are 6 outdoor hard courts. These are dedicated courts with permanent lines and nets. The courts are free.

name: Hastings House
description: Hastings House is a place to play pickleball in Sequim, WA. There is 1 outdoor court. This is a dedicated court with a permanent net and lines. The court is private.

name: Sequim Boys/Girls Club
description: Come play pickleball at Sequim Boys/Girls Club in Sequim, WA! There are 4 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. A membership is required to play. Players have access to restrooms and lights.

name: Vern Burton Community Center
description: Vern Burton Community Center is one of the most popular places to play pickleball in Port Angeles, WA. There are 3 indoor wood courts. The lines are permanent, and portable nets are available. The facility includes amenities like lights, water, and restrooms. A one-time fee is required to play.
